sections.paragraph:
Original: מת

Transliteration: math

Phonetic: math

BDB Definition:

  1. male, man
    1. males, men
    2. few men (in prose)
      1. less emphasis on sex
    3. men (poetic)
      1. less emphasis on sex

Origin: from the same as H4970

TWOT entry: 1263

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
